productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Blue Printed Top
description: CompositionBlue boat neck top made of 100% cotton, with graphic print on the chest and a tie-up detail on the hemFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron directly on print/embroideryLadies, time to stock up your wardrobe with basic off-duty essentials like this top from united colors of benetton. Perfect for layering, or for a laid-back casual look styled minimalistically with jeans, this is sure to become a love-forever piece in your closet. For the best layering effect, wear this under a structured blazer and interesting denims.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
